params_frozen.design_provenance: Pan-Poteshman 2006 (RFS) INSPIRED proxy test using aggregated daily put-call volume on a pre-2018 fresh OOS window. NOT a literal replication: Pan-Poteshman used proprietary CBOE open-close transaction data with informed/uninformed flow decomposition, demonstrating 'only the nonpublic (informed) signal predicts returns; the public signal shows no predictability' (RFS 2006 abstract + Perplexity adversarial review 2026-05-05). We have only daily-aggregated optVolPut/optVolCall from iVol /smd, which conflates informed and uninformed flow plus mechanical-hedging volume from market makers. The pure-replica scorer would test the PUBLIC component which Pan-Poteshman themselves showed is non-predictive — guaranteed FAIL by their own results. To extract the predictive subset, the scorer residualizes the abnormal P/C ratio against equity controls (log_marketCap, reversal_1m, momentum_6m, rv_30d) cross-sectionally, mirroring v9D's residualization architecture. Discovery: cache audit 2026-05-05 (post v9D retrospective INCONCLUSIVE) verified that vendor /smd endpoint pre-aggregates these P/C fields — feature columns that v7/v8/v9A/v9D NEVER used (those used only IV-level features ivx30, ivp30, rv_30d). Cache backfill 2026-05-04 extended pre-2018 history for ~949 tickers with full P/C field coverage. Window 2008-2018 IS adjacent OOS to source literature (Pan-Poteshman 1990-2001) and PRE-DATES most post-2015 structural changes (zero-DTE 2019+, Robinhood retail flow 2015+, MM hedging automation). FAIL on 2008-2018 = clean kill (proxy didn't work even in favorable era). PASS = corroborates extractability of Pan-Poteshman-class signal from aggregated data via residualization. Same retrospective methodology bundle (pre-reg + multi-phase + Andrews-Manski bounds + Romano-Wolf) as v9d_retrospective_pre_2018_2026_05_05.
params_frozen.design_memo: TBD — to be drafted after adversarial review (B1.1)
params_frozen.adversarial_review_summary: DUAL-ROUND PRE-LOCK adversarial review 2026-05-05: (Round 1, before draft) Perplexity Sonar Reasoning Pro flagged cache-audit-driven discovery as exploratory contamination → program-level Bonferroni n=26 |t|≥2.85 BINDS regardless of class label; decay literature absent-but-plausible post-2015. (Round 2, after draft, zen gemini-3-pro-preview + Perplexity high-context): both converged on APPROVE-WITH-AMENDMENTS. Critical findings: (1) Pan-Poteshman 2006 explicitly demonstrated public-flow component is NON-PREDICTIVE; aggregated daily data captures public confounds (mechanical hedging, vol scaling, contemporaneous returns) — pure replica without residualization is GUARANTEED FAIL by Pan-Poteshman's own evidence, mechanical not signal-test. (2) Scorer must residualize abnormal P/C against (log_marketCap, reversal_1m, momentum_6m, rv_30d) controls to have any chance of extracting predictive subset (zen amendment, Perplexity-corroborated). (3) Universe U2 (cache-only) silently drops mid-period delistings, biasing put-volume signal — FAIL on U2 alone insufficient to close class; require U3 NBER follow-up if non-FAIL verdict. (4) 2008-09 GFC may saturate 60d-rolling cross-sectional ranking — Phase 0 saturation diagnostic added. (5) Frame honestly as 'Pan-Poteshman-inspired proxy test using aggregated daily data' NOT 'replication' (literature-honest given data limitations). Verdict: APPROVE pre-reg lock with these 5 amendments incorporated 2026-05-05.

scorer_frozen.specification: Cross-sectional residual of abnormal P/C volume against equity controls. Per-asof: (1) compute pcr_t = log(optVolPut_t / max(optVolCall_t, 1)) per ticker; (2) compute abnormal_pcr_t = pcr_t - rolling_mean(pcr, window=60_trading_days, min_obs=30); (3) per asof, run cross-sectional OLS: abnormal_pcr_t ~ reversal_1m + momentum_6m + rv_30d; (4) score = -residual (negate so highest-score = abnormally-LOW pcr = bullish call activity per Pan-Poteshman 2006). Architecture identical to v9D cross_sectional_residual.score_cross_sectional_residual, only feature swap (abnormal_pcr_t in place of -ivp30). Residualization is PRE-COMMITTED amendment per zen+Perplexity adversarial review 2026-05-05; without it the scorer would test only the public-flow component which Pan-Poteshman 2006 demonstrated lacks predictive power. PRE-FIRST-RUN AMENDMENT 2026-05-05: log_marketCap removed from control set after smoke test (zero αt computed, zero data peek) revealed vendor smd cache has marketCap+outstandingShares populated only 2025-12-24+; pre-2018 retrospective infeasible with size control. Resulting 3-control set matches v9D exactly, minimizing HARK surface; size confound deferred to U3 NBER follow-up where alternative size proxies can be built. Phase_0_gates.scorer_implementation_locked_before_run permits this exact amendment class (data-availability discrepancy, not discretionary spec change).
scorer_frozen.feature_construction: Step 1: pcr_t = log(optVolPut_t / max(optVolCall_t, 1.0)). Sentinel: if optVolPut_t == 0 OR optVolCall_t == 0, set pcr_t = NaN (zero-volume tickers excluded). Step 2: abnormal_pcr_t = pcr_t - mean(pcr over t-60..t-1 trading days), requiring ≥30 non-NaN obs in window. Step 3: equity controls per asof: reversal_1m = -close_t/close_{t-21}+1, momentum_6m = close_{t-21}/close_{t-126}-1, rv_30d = std(log_returns over t-30..t-1)*sqrt(252). Step 4: cross-sectional OLS of abnormal_pcr_t on [reversal_1m, momentum_6m, rv_30d] per asof, score = -residual. Min 50 tickers per asof for cross-sectional regression to be valid; below 50 → return NaN scores for that asof.
scorer_frozen.score_direction: Long-only top decile by score (= -residual of abnormal_pcr_t). Equal weight. Equivalent to selecting tickers where actual put/call ratio is most-anomalously-LOW relative to size+momentum+vol controls, interpreted per Pan-Poteshman 2006 as abnormal informed call buying.
scorer_frozen.modification_during_retrospective: PROHIBITED — any drift in scorer spec invalidates the test

params_frozen.data_provider: iVolatility $399 retail tier (probe v5 99.5% T1) — same as v7/v8/v9/v10/v9d_retrospective; cache 2007-01-01 → 2026-04-30 per project_ivolatility_pre2018_backfill_2026_05_04

U2_ivol_cache_contents.description: All iVol cache parquets with valid SMD data on asof, ADV ≥ $2M filter applied. Includes ~1339 pre-2018 delisted firms backfilled 2026-05-04. Primary universe for verdict (v9d_retrospective experience: U2 simpler than U3 NBER reconstruction and adequate for fresh-feature-space test; U3 reconstruction overhead deferred unless v11 PASS triggers more rigorous follow-up).

U1_legacy_pit_yaml.description: Existing pit_universe yaml snapshots filtered by iwm_current.yaml seed. Worst-case max-survivor-bias baseline.

universe_sensitivity_variants.empirical_bias_estimate: U1_αt − U2_αt computed at verdict-time as descriptive sanity check; if Δ > 3.0 αt → RECONSTRUCTION_DOMINANT verdict (signal is just survivor bias)

phase_audit.rationale: Mirror v9d_retrospective phase grid (5 phases × 3 sub-periods × U-variants). Total cells = 30 (5 × 3 × 2).

sub_periods_locked.name: GFC_recovery
sub_periods_locked.rationale: Same windows as v9d_retrospective for cross-experiment phase-comparison sanity; GFC + early recovery

sub_periods_locked.name: mid_cycle_eu_debt
sub_periods_locked.rationale: Low-vol bull + EU sovereign debt + taper tantrum

sub_periods_locked.name: late_cycle_china_shock
sub_periods_locked.rationale: China 2015-16 shock + Brexit + 2018 vol spike. NB: covers early Robinhood era (2015 launch) — if signal decays mid-period, expect αt drop in this sub-period vs GFC_recovery.

terminal_return_policy.rule: Same as v9d_retrospective: when ticker held in holding window has last_tradeDate < holding_end and ticker is flagged as delisted, inject return = -1.0 (Shumway 1997 NASDAQ default). Without patch, silent NaN-drop biases long-only top-decile αt upward.
terminal_return_policy.rationale: Without patch, silent NaN-drop biases long-only top-decile αt upward by ignoring catastrophic delisting outcomes
terminal_return_policy.sensitivity_alternative: Re-run with -0.55 (Shumway NASDAQ-conditional median) on U2 only as descriptive check; not a primary gate

feature_coverage_anchor.rule: U2 universe at any sub-period midpoint must have ≥ 200 tickers with abnormal_pcr_t computable (i.e., optVolPut+optVolCall non-NaN AND ≥30 of prior 60 obs non-NaN). Below 200 → ABORT, cache too sparse.
feature_coverage_anchor.rationale: P/C feature is sparser pre-2010 than IV-level features. Empirical floor for cross-sectional regression.

saturation_diagnostic_2008_gfc.rule: On any asof in GFC_recovery sub-period (2008-2011), if fraction of cross-section with |abnormal_pcr_t| > 3σ exceeds 50%, mark that asof as INDETERMINATE in cell aggregation (not failure of universe but ranking degeneracy under regime shift). If >30% of GFC_recovery asofs are INDETERMINATE, sub-period verdict is REGIME_INDETERMINATE not PASS/FAIL.
saturation_diagnostic_2008_gfc.rationale: Pan-Poteshman's fixed-window methodology is unstudied during 2008 GFC regime shift (Perplexity 2026-05-05: no peer-reviewed guidance on EWMA vs fixed-60d for crisis robustness). Saturation diagnostic guards against false signal/noise from cross-sectional ranking collapse.

no_data_peeking_clause.rule: Pre-reg locked PRIOR to any pre-2018 P/C-volume backtest run. ANY ad-hoc pre-2018 P/C-feature experiment before this lock invalidates pre-reg.

scorer_implementation_locked_before_run.rule: scorer module + tests committed AND lock_hash recorded BEFORE first pre-2018 backtest run. Spec drift between pre-reg and implementation invalidates pre-reg.
scorer_implementation_locked_before_run.rationale: B1.2 (implementation) must produce frozen scorer matching this pre-reg verbatim

periods.rationale: Fresh OOS — P/C-abnormal-volume scorer NEVER evaluated on this window (or any window in this project — feature space unused in v7/v8/v9/v10). 10y span × 52 weeks ≈ 520 weekly obs. Pre-reg explicitly excludes 2007 due to iVol cache sparsity at boundary plus first-3-month coverage warmup (matches v9d_retrospective convention).

success_criteria.primary_metric: Carhart 4-factor αt on long-only top-decile portfolio returns (decile minus benchmark MDY), pooled across 5 phases × 3 sub-periods on U2 universe with terminal-return patch active

bonferroni_accounting.intra_class_claim: options_volume_search_2026_05_05 (FRESH sub-class — distinct feature columns from options_implied_search_2026_05_02; v7-v9 used IV-level features only)
bonferroni_accounting.rationale: Adversarial review (Perplexity 2026-05-05) judges cache-audit-driven discovery as exploratory contamination: 'Unless you can timestamp a pre-analysis plan saying check iVolatility for P/C aggregates before touching 2024-26, the discovery method contaminates the classification.' No such pre-cache-audit plan was registered. CONSERVATIVE position: program-level Bonferroni binds regardless of class label. Fresh-sub-class claim documented for taxonomy/future work but NOT used to relax verdict gate.
bonferroni_accounting.amendment_if_adversarial_review_override: If B1.1 second-round adversarial review (zen+perplexity) judges intra-class n=1 reset legitimate AND argues retrospective-window unburnt-by-construction overrides cache-audit-discovery contamination, gates may relax to |t|≥1.96. Such amendment requires PRE-RUN written justification. Post-data-peek amendment is FORBIDDEN.

bias_range_locked.rationale: Same range as v9d_retrospective (DFA 60bps + small/mid-cap multiplier per Perplexity → 120-150bps; extended to 200bps for residual reconstruction error). U2 universe reuses iVol cache (no NBER reconstruction here) so bias may run higher than v9d_retrospective U3; sensitivity check via U1 comparison.
bias_range_locked.applied_in_inference: Andrews-Manski bounds CI computed as [αt_observed_pct − 2.0%, αt_observed_pct − 1.0%] in annualized excess return terms; mapped to t-stat space via cells' empirical SE

all_gates_must_pass.rule: Carhart 4F αt on U2 (primary universe) pooled across 5 phases × 3 sub-periods ≥ +2.85 (program-level Bonferroni binding)
Andrews-Manski lower-bound of unbiased αt (= αt_observed_pct − 2.0%/y in annualized excess space, mapped to t-stat) ≥ 0
max(αt) − min(αt) across 5 phases on U2 (within each sub-period) ≤ 1.5 per sub-period

max(αt_sub_period) − min(αt_sub_period) ≤ 2.5 across 3 sub-periods on U2 (regime-stability check). Pan-Poteshman decay hypothesis: late_cycle_china_shock αt < GFC_recovery αt by >1.0 = empirical decay signature.
U2 αt within 2.5 of U1 αt; |U1−U2| > 3.0 flags reconstruction-bias dominates signal (RECONSTRUCTION_DOMINANT verdict)
Re-run on U2 with terminal_return = -0.55 (Shumway NASDAQ-conditional) yields αt within ±0.5 of -1.0 default. If gap >0.5, signal depends on terminal-return assumption — INCONCLUSIVE not PASS.

verdict_classification.G1_PASS_AND_alpha_t_above_3.5: PASS_ROBUST — signal validated bias-robust + multiple-testing-adjusted. Strong Pan-Poteshman replication on adjacent OOS. Class options_volume opens for capital deployment consideration; triggers prospective walk-forward replication.
verdict_classification.G1_PASS_AND_G2_PASS_AND_alpha_t_in_2.85_: PASS_MARGINAL — passes program-level Bonferroni at lower edge. Weak Pan-Poteshman replication; capital deploy still off-table until prospective replication.
verdict_classification.G1_FAIL_AND_alpha_t_in_1.0_to_2.85: INCONCLUSIVE — directional signal but below adjusted threshold. Class options_volume stays open for refinement (cross-sectional residual variant, OI-based vs vol-based dichotomy).
verdict_classification.G1_FAIL_AND_alpha_t_below_1.0: FAIL_ROBUST_TENTATIVE — signal does not extract on U2 cache-only universe. Class options_volume NOT yet closed: per zen 2026-05-05, U2 silently drops mid-period delistings precisely where put-volume signal should fire. Before declaring class closure, MUST run U3 NBER-reconstruction follow-up if budget permits. If U3 follow-up also FAIL → FAIL_ROBUST, class effectively closed. If U3 not feasible → INCONCLUSIVE_DATA_LIMITED, class kept open with caveat.
verdict_classification.G3_or_G4_FAIL_at_otherwise_PASS_alpha_t: REGIME_DEPENDENT — phase or sub-period dispersion exceeds threshold despite mean αt passing.
verdict_classification.G5_FAIL_with_U1_U2_gap_above_3.0: RECONSTRUCTION_DOMINANT — survivorship bias swamps signal; uninterpretable.

kill_pre_full_run: Phase 0 feature_coverage_anchor fails on any sub-period midpoint → ABORT (cache too sparse for cross-sectional regression)
Phase 0 scorer_implementation_locked_before_run hash mismatch → ABORT (spec drifted between pre-reg and implementation)
Phase 2 smoke run on a single asof yields < 50 ranked tickers → ABORT (decile_size < 5 = no cross-sectional power)
success_criteria.no_stretch_tier: Single multi-gate verdict tree. Six exhaustive verdicts (PASS_ROBUST | PASS_MARGINAL | INCONCLUSIVE | FAIL_ROBUST | REGIME_DEPENDENT | RECONSTRUCTION_DOMINANT). No exploratory tier.
success_criteria.capital_deploy_clause: Capital deploy remains OFF-TABLE on retrospective alone regardless of verdict. PASS_ROBUST shortens prospective replication wait window; PASS_MARGINAL keeps full 12mo; all other verdicts maintain status quo (paper-trade checkpoint ~2027-05-04 for v9D class).

lock_hash_protocol.method: SHA256 of this JSON file content (with hash_to_compute_at_phase_0_close set to literal 'TBD' before hashing) computed and stored in ledger entry at registration. Any subsequent modification to params_frozen invalidates pre-reg.
lock_hash_protocol.amendment_2026_05_05_post_smoke: log_marketCap removed from controls after smoke test on AAPL revealed vendor cache has marketCap populated only 2025-12-24+ (pre-2018 entirely NaN). Amendment is data-availability-driven, not discretionary; zero αt computed before amendment. Re-hash recorded below.
